headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: Section  51. Subcontractor  Project  Information  Sheet.  Subcontractor  shall  fill  out  the  Subcontractor  Project Information Sheet, attached hereto as Exhibit 'H' , which shall be attached hereto and made a part of the executed Subcontract.  In  addition,  Contractor  requires  that  Subcontractor  be  solvent  throughout  the  entirety  of  the Subcontract Work. As such, Subcontractor shall provide financials to Contractor upon request of such. Refusal to provide Contractor the attached information on Exhibit H and the financials, if requested, shall be considered a default of the Subcontractor as reflected herein.
